title: paepalanthus ciliatus
intro: Paepalanthus ciliatus, a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae, is native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paepalanthus ciliatus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Paepalanthus ciliatus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using the plant's essential oil in aromatherapy.
